channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: France blocks US ambassador’s access to officials after he fails to attend meeting
item.description: Charles Kushner, father of president’s son-in-law Jared, had been summoned to explain US comments relating to death of far-right activist Donald Trump...

item.title: Macron ‘very sceptical’ about Russia-Ukraine peace talks as Europe marks four years of war – Europe live
item.description: France’s president says ‘there is no willingness on the Russian side to have peace’ Zelenskyy says “we must be just as determined and strong as we wer...

item.title: Donald Trump’s new 10% global tariff comes into effect
item.description: US president had said he would raise levy to 15% after last week’s supreme court ruling Business live – latest updates Donald Trump’s new global tarif...

item.title: Trump’s new global tariffs kick in at 10%; Bank of England governor says March rate cut ‘open question’ – as it happened
item.description: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news While many exporters around the world cheered when the supreme court ruled against Trump’s ...

item.title: Government to release Andrew trade envoy documents amid fierce criticism of former prince in MPs’ debate – UK politics live
item.description: MPs pass motion as trade minister Chris Bryant says Andrew ‘could not distinguish between public and private interest’ Keir Starmer is taking part in ...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie's family offers $1m reward to bring home missing mother
item.description: Fighting back tears, the missing woman's NBC host daughter says they accept she may be dead.

item.title: PSG's Hakimi to face trial after rape allegation
item.description: Paris St-Germain defender Achraf Hakimi says he is set to face trial after an allegation of rape was made against him.

item.title: Why Champions League return is crucial to Man Utd
item.description: Up to fourth in the Premier League after Monday's win at Everton, Champions League qualification would be a big boost to Manchester United's finances ...

item.title: PSG's Hakimi to face trial after rape allegation
item.description: Paris St-Germain defender Achraf Hakimi says he is set to face trial after an allegation of rape was made against him.

item.title: BBC edited a second racial slur out of Bafta ceremony
item.description: The BBC's chief content officer Kate Phillips says a slur that aired was the result of a genuine error.
